entities.name: Alzheimer disease
entities.description: Neurodegenerative disease; genetic variants play crucial role in pathogenesis
entities.evidence: The genetic variants play a crucial role in the pathogenesis of Alzheimer's disease (AD)

entities.name: GAB2
entities.description: Growth factor receptor-bound protein-associated binding protein 2; evaluated for association with AD
entities.evidence: growth factor receptor-bound protein-associated binding protein 2 (GAB2)

entities.name: PICALM
entities.description: Phosphatidylinositol binding clathrin assembly protein; AD susceptibility gene with multiple SNPs evaluated

entities.name: SORL1
entities.description: Sortilin-related receptor; multiple SNPs significantly associated with AD
entities.evidence: sortilin-related receptor (SORL1) variants are associated with AD

entities.name: GAB2 rs2373115
entities.description: G>T SNP in GAB2; no significant association with AD found in meta-analysis
entities.evidence: no significant association between SNPs of GAB2 rs2373115 (G > T)

entities.name: PICALM rs541458
entities.description: C>T SNP in PICALM; no significant association with AD in this meta-analysis

entities.name: PICALM rs3851179
entities.description: SNP in PICALM; T allele associated with 13% increased risk of AD
entities.evidence: The allele T of rs3851179 in PICALM was associated with a 13 % increase in the risk of AD

entities.name: SORL1 rs1010159
entities.description: SNP in SORL1; T allele associated with decreased risk of AD
entities.evidence: rs1010159*T... were associated with a decreased risk of AD

entities.name: SORL1 rs641120
entities.description: SNP in SORL1; A allele associated with decreased risk of AD
entities.evidence: rs641120*A... were associated with a decreased risk of AD

entities.name: SORL1 rs668387

entities.evidence: rs668387*T... were associated with a decreased risk of AD

entities.name: SORL1 rs689021
entities.description: SNP in SORL1; A allele associated with decreased risk of AD
entities.evidence: rs689021*A, were associated with a decreased risk of AD

entities.name: SORL1 rs12285364
entities.description: SNP in SORL1; T allele associated with increased risk of AD
entities.evidence: rs12285364*T... were all associated with an increased risk of AD

entities.name: SORL1 rs2070045
entities.description: SNP in SORL1; G allele associated with increased risk of AD
